meaning: n.屈膝礼n.女人行的鞠躬礼
examples: She tried to curtsey as she spoke—fancy curtseying as you're falling through the air!
She tried to curtsey as she spoke.
Women should curtsey - "a little bob is quite sufficient" said Mr Williamson.
She was placed in the awkward post-divorce position of having, in the strictest terms of royal etiquette, to curtsey before her sons.
